access.app_review_note: Developer token Google Ads requires approval workflow. Basic tier (test accounts only, 15k ops/day) auto-approved after request. Standard tier (production accounts, scaled ops) requires Google review form 2-4 weeks, justification compte + cas usage. Workaround : utiliser MCC token client-side si client a déjà un developer token standard, login_customer_id = MCC, customer_id = sub-account audited.
access.shared_token_note: Developer token Google Ads NON shared cross-brand (vs Meta). Chaque brand a son propre customer_id, mais developer_token peut être agency-wide si MCC structure.

rate_limits.tier_note: Basic tier = 15k ops/day (test accounts only). Standard tier = 40k ops/day (production). Throttle silencieux possible : status code 429 + RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED. Backoff exponential 2^N seconds (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 60s).

operations.name: search_query
operations.description: Pull data via Google Ads Query Language (GAQL)
operations.example: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS
operations.notes: cost_micros = cost in micro-units (divide by 1M for currency). SearchStream pour large datasets, Search pour pagination classique.

operations.name: audit_pmax_campaigns
operations.description: Pull toutes les PMAX campaigns actives d'un compte
operations.example: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, campaign.bidding_strategy_type, campaign.bidding_strategy_system_status, campaign.maximize_conversion_value.target_roas, campaign.start_date FROM campaign WHERE campaign.advertising_channel_type = 'PERFORMANCE_MAX' AND campaign.status IN ('ENABLED', 'PAUSED')
operations.notes: Filter advertising_channel_type = PERFORMANCE_MAX strict. campaign.bidding_strategy_system_status révèle learning state (LEARNING_NEW, LEARNING_BID_CHANGE, LIMITED_BY_BUDGET, MISCONFIGURED).

operations.name: get_asset_groups
operations.description: Pull asset groups par PMAX campaign + ad strength score
operations.example: SELECT asset_group.id, asset_group.name, asset_group.status, asset_group.ad_strength, asset_group.primary_status FROM asset_group WHERE campaign.id = {campaign_id}
operations.notes: ad_strength enum : POOR, AVERAGE, GOOD, EXCELLENT. Seuils canon : POOR <60% champs remplis, AVERAGE 60-80%, GOOD 80-100%, EXCELLENT 100% + variety. POOR triggere 50% perf reach reduction observée.

operations.name: get_audience_signals
operations.description: Pull audience signals composition par asset group
operations.example: SELECT asset_group_signal.audience, asset_group_signal.asset_group FROM asset_group_signal WHERE asset_group.id = {asset_group_id}
operations.notes: Audience signals = hint pour smart bidding (pas targeting strict). Composition canon : 1P data 80% (customer match, website visitors, purchasers), custom segments 15% (search intent + URL visited), demographics 5% (age, gender, household income).

operations.name: get_search_themes
operations.description: Pull search themes insights (positive search behavior categories)
operations.example: SELECT campaign_search_term_insight.category_label, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions, metrics.conversions FROM campaign_search_term_insight WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS AND campaign.id = {campaign_id}
operations.notes: Search themes positifs configurés non-pullable via API (UI only). Cet endpoint donne search term insights (catégories agrégées). Negative search themes pullable via campaign_criterion.negative.

operations.name: get_brand_exclusions
operations.description: Pull brand exclusions list par campaign
operations.example: SELECT campaign.brand_safety_suitability, campaign_criterion.brand_list, campaign_criterion.negative FROM campaign_criterion WHERE campaign_criterion.type = 'BRAND_LIST' AND campaign.id = {campaign_id}
operations.notes: Brand list = liste curated brands à exclude (own + variants + competitors). Maintenue cross-account si MCC structure. Vide = cannibalisation Search Brand campaign + spend owned-traffic gaspillé.

operations.name: get_value_rules
operations.description: Pull conversion value rules (location, device, audience modifiers)
operations.notes: Value rules permettent ajuster conversion value en runtime selon location (core market +20%), device (mobile +10%), audience (existing customer -30% pour favoriser acquisition). Indispensable Target ROAS bidding sur compte mature.

operations.name: audit_conversion_setup
operations.description: Pull conversion goals + attribution model + lookback windows
operations.example: SELECT customer_conversion_goal.category, customer_conversion_goal.origin, customer_conversion_goal.biddable, conversion_action.name, conversion_action.type, conversion_action.attribution_model_settings.attribution_model, conversion_action.click_through_lookback_window_days, conversion_action.view_through_lookback_window_days, conversion_action.value_settings.default_value FROM conversion_action
operations.notes: Conversion goals = portfolio strategy (account-level conversions). Canon e-commerce : 1 primary (purchase) + N secondary (add_to_cart, view_product, lead). Attribution data-driven recommandé si >300 conv/30j.

operations.name: pull_pmax_insights
operations.description: Pull PMAX-specific insights (audience, search categories, asset performance)
operations.example: SELECT campaign_audience_view.resource_name, audience.name, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign_audience_view WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS AND campaign.advertising_channel_type = 'PERFORMANCE_MAX'
operations.notes: PMAX insights agrégés (Google ne révèle pas placement-level pour PMAX). Cross-référence avec asset_group performance pour identifier top-thematic.

operations.name: get_negative_keywords_portfolio
operations.description: Pull negative keywords list portfolio account-wide
operations.example: SELECT shared_set.name, shared_set.type, shared_criterion.keyword.text, shared_criterion.keyword.match_type FROM shared_criterion WHERE shared_set.type = 'NEGATIVE_KEYWORDS'
operations.notes: Negative keywords portfolio = shared list applied cross-campaign. Canon : 100-500 negatives e-commerce mature (irrelevant intent, competitor brands, off-niche queries).

operations.name: audit_smart_bidding_status
operations.description: Audit smart bidding learning state + recent changes
operations.example: SELECT campaign.bidding_strategy_type, campaign.bidding_strategy_system_status, campaign.target_cpa.target_cpa_micros, campaign.maximize_conversion_value.target_roas FROM campaign WHERE campaign.advertising_channel_type = 'PERFORMANCE_MAX'
operations.notes: bidding_strategy_system_status enum : LEARNING_NEW, LEARNING_BUDGET_CHANGE, LEARNING_BID_CHANGE, LEARNING_CONVERSION_TYPE_CHANGE, LEARNING_COMPOSITION_CHANGE, LIMITED_BY_BUDGET, MISCONFIGURED, ENABLED. LEARNING_* >7j = issue sous-optimisation.

operations.name: audit_asset_strength
operations.description: Audit asset variety + count par asset group
operations.example: SELECT asset.id, asset.type, asset.text_asset.text, asset.image_asset.full_size.url, asset.image_asset.full_size.width_pixels, asset.image_asset.full_size.height_pixels FROM asset_group_asset WHERE asset_group.id = {asset_group_id}
operations.notes: Canon par asset group : 5-15 headlines (30 char), 1-5 long headlines (90 char), 1-5 descriptions (90 char), 3-20 images multi-ratio (square + landscape obligatoire), 1-5 videos 10-30s, 1-5 logos (square + landscape). Asset variety = leverage strength score.

operations.name: create_campaign
operations.description: Create a Performance Max or Search campaign
operations.notes: Always create PAUSED. Performance Max requires asset groups (not ad groups). Set start_date après asset groups completion sinon learning start prématuré.

naming_conventions.separator_rules: Tiret (-) séparateur niveaux. Pas d'underscore. Pas d'accent.

known_limitations: Developer token requires Google approval (basic vs standard tier). Standard tier = 2-4 weeks review.
Customer ID format strict : XXX-XXX-XXXX (with dashes for display, no dashes for API).
PMAX assets cannot be edited after asset group creation, only added (delete + recreate workaround).
Search themes positives configurés non-pullable via API (UI only). Insight endpoint donne agrégats categories.
PMAX placement-level performance non-révélé (Google blackbox). Insights agrégés audience + search categories seulement.
Asset group ad_strength score recalculé async (peut prendre 24-48h post-asset update).
Brand exclusions list mutation requires shared_set creation préalable (2-step process).
Smart bidding learning period reset si change : bid strategy, budget >20%, conversion type, asset composition majeure.
Conversion value rules max 100 par account (Google enforced cap).
Negative keywords shared_set max 5000 entries par list.
learned_rules: asset_strength : Excellent = 100% champs remplis + variety, Good = 80-100%, Fair = 60-80%, Below Average <60%. Au seuil Below Average, 50% perf reach reduction observée. Action prioritaire = combler gaps assets jusqu'à Good minimum.
search_themes : Negative search themes obligatoire (brand keywords + competitor brands + irrelevant intent). 20-50 negatives standard PMAX mature. Zéro negatives = 20-50% spend off-target observé.
audience_signals : 1P data 80% poids canon, custom segments 15%, demographics 5%. 1P data absent OR demographics-only = signal qualité dégradé, smart bidding sous-optimisé.

conversion_setup : Account-level conversions = stratégie portfolio (recommandé default). Campaign-level conversions = test isolated specific. JAMAIS mixer sans intent documenté (confusion smart bidding signal).

bidding : Maximize Conversions stade 0 (<30 conv/30j). Target CPA après 30 conv/30j stable. Target ROAS après 50 conv/30j stable + value tracked. Target activé prématurément = no learning, volatility.
learning_period : 7j minimum smart bidding learning. NE PAS changer bid strategy + budget +20% + conversion type pendant learning, sinon reset 7j supplémentaires.
brand_exclusions : Brand + variants + competitor brands. Liste maintenue cross-account si MCC. Absent = cannibalisation Search Brand + spend owned-traffic gaspillé.
value_rules : Indispensable Target ROAS sur compte mature. Location modifier (core market +20%), device (mobile/desktop split), audience (existing customer -30% pour favoriser acquisition).
listing_groups : Shopping integration PMAX, full catalog default. Exclure produits loss-leader + stock zéro. Custom segmentation par margin/category/perf = leverage Target ROAS granularity.
attribution_model : Data-driven recommandé si >300 conv/30j. Last-click legacy fallback. Position-based niche use case. Data-driven non-activé sur compte mature = signal causalité perdu.

asset_variety : 5-15 headlines + 1-5 long headlines + 1-5 descriptions + 3-20 images (square + landscape obligatoire) + 1-5 videos 10-30s + 1-5 logos. Video absent = Google auto-genère depuis static (low quality).
rate_limit : Standard tier 40k ops/day. Basic tier 15k ops/day (test only). Backoff exponential 2^N seconds sur 429. Batch GAQL queries (SearchStream) > individual calls pour large datasets.
mcc_strategy : Login_customer_id = MCC manager account, customer_id = sub-account audited. Permet developer_token agency-wide vs token per-brand.
operator_notes: Senior buyer observation : 80% des comptes PMAX audités ont strength score AVERAGE ou POOR sur 50%+ asset groups. Quick win prioritaire = combler assets jusqu'à GOOD avant tout autre optimisation.
Senior buyer observation : Brand exclusions absentes sur 60%+ des comptes PMAX. Cannibalisation Search Brand systémique, fix = liste brand + variants + competitor brands appliquée campaign-level.
Anti-pattern observé : opérateurs activent Target ROAS dès création campaign PMAX. No learning, volatility 30-50% premiers 14j. Fix = Maximize Conversions 30j minimum avant target.
Anti-pattern observé : audit PMAX freestyle sans asset group strength check = miss 50% du diagnostic. Le ad_strength field est le KPI #1 de santé PMAX, jamais sauter.
Workaround MCC : si client a developer_token standard, opérer en login_customer_id = MCC + customer_id = client sub-account. Évite app review process per-brand.
